research_notes:
Intrepid's focus on authentic adventure storytelling and responsible travel gives Lucy a meaningful narrative layer beyond destination content, strengthening the creative case for collaboration.

Intrepid Travel is a purpose-led adventure travel company with a well-established content creator programme. They recently launched their 'Real Life Experiences' campaign repositioning their brand around authentic, off-the-beaten-path travel, and have been actively recruiting filmmakers and photographers who can produce documentary-style content rather than polished commercial advertising. They have a dedicated 'Media and Influencer' team and have run hosted trips with creators across the 90k–500k follower range. Their sustainability and responsible travel ethos adds a genuine story angle beyond destination promotion.

Much Better Adventures sits at the intersection of adventure, sustainability, and quality — a strong brand-audience alignment with Lucy's community and content style.

Much Better Adventures is a UK-based adventure travel operator curating small-group trips led by expert local guides, with a strong focus on sustainability and genuine wilderness experiences. They have a growing creator partnership programme and have worked with adventure filmmakers and photographers to produce content for their social channels and editorial. Recent destination campaigns have covered Iceland, the Dolomites, and Kyrgyzstan. Their audience and brand positioning — active, values-led adventure seekers — closely mirrors Lucy's own following.

Hurtigruten's remote expedition routes and cinematic natural environments are a strong creative match for Lucy's adventure filmmaking style and Sony camera setup.

Hurtigruten Expeditions operates small-ship expedition cruises to remote destinations including Norway, Antarctica, Greenland, and the Galápagos. They have an active creator and media partnership programme, inviting filmmakers aboard to produce cinematic content showcasing expedition experiences. In 2024 they launched an expanded 'Closer to Nature' campaign promoting their Norwegian Coastal Express and Arctic expedition routes, with a focus on authentic, high-production video content distributed on YouTube and social platforms. Their remote, visually spectacular destinations are ideally suited to Lucy's cinematic adventure aesthetic.

Lucy's cinematic, story-led approach matches the premium and conservation-conscious brand identity that &Beyond requires from creator partners.

&Beyond is a luxury responsible travel company operating lodges and expeditions across Africa, Asia, and South America. They have a selective but active creator partnership programme, prioritising high-production-value filmmakers who can produce content that reflects the premium and conservation-focused nature of their brand. Their recent 'Phinda Private Game Reserve' reopening and new Botswana Okavango Delta camps have been focal points for creator campaigns in 2024. Their audience expects aspirational, cinematic content rather than standard influencer posts, making Lucy's filmmaking background a strong differentiator.
